title: TurkStat Quarterly GDP by Expenditure Approach — current prices and chain-linked volume index
time_coverage: quarterly series, historical run through latest available quarter (2026 Q1 per portal)
units: current-price file: national currency value/share/% change; volume-index file: chain-linked volume index (2009=100) and % change
notes: Path in the veriportali.tuik.gov.tr statistical-themes tree: National Accounts > Quarterly Gross Domestic Product > GDP by Expenditure Approach > Tables and Graphics > 'GDP by Expenditure Approach in Current Prices' / 'in Chain Linked Volume Index'. Same signed-download-URL mechanism as the CPI dataset in this source (see turkstat/cpi/manifest.json notes for how these tokenized URLs were extracted). Provincial/regional GDP tables also exist in the same tree (id prefix 16.90.*) but were skipped as out of scope (task asked for national GDP).
